examples: [contest] make me 10 question problem set euclid -> I generated a mixed-year 10-problem set (Euclid; years 2017-2026). Use the download button below to open the PDF.

[contest] can you make the solutions for that -> I’m happy to work through the solutions, but I need the exact problem statements first. Could you please provide the ten Euclid problems you’d like solved? Once I have them, I’ll give detailed step‑by‑step solutions for each one.
